channel.title: Perspectives — Purvi Banker Parikh
channel.description: Perspectives on the profession, governance, and the ideas that change how I see things.

item.title: The trusted advisor, at scale
item.description: A book about trust, a report about consolidation, and a question about independence, private equity, and who a firm really grows for.

item.title: As the journey continues
item.description: Five years ago I wrote a piece promising a journey of knowledge — and of sharing it. This is me keeping that promise.

item.title: A milestone achieved
item.description: Completing all four papers of the US CPA — and a word of thanks to those who made the journey lighter.

item.title: As the journey begins
item.description: Going back to learning in the middle of the pandemic, and the start of the CPA journey.
